calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Denied

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-15-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Anna Antonsson, present in Pro Per; Respondent, Marcel Sengul, present in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Kane. (Defendant, Martin Kast, was previously dismissed.)
9:37am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is identified or retained.
NOTE: ROA shows that defendant's exhibits were retained at the SC hearing, but it was Plaintiff's exhibits that were retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-02-2010 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
